generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical actuator embedded in BIM model that receives control signals from the Digital Twin to adjust adaptive lighting systems based on occupancy and environmental conditions"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) actuator configured in BIM to regulate HVAC operations based on real-time data from sensors and Digital Twin analytics"
]

instance BOREALISReinforcementLearner : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based controller (BOREALIS) integrated with the Digital Twin to dynamically optimize lighting policies through iterative feedback loops"
]

instance TwinLightRuleEngine : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Rule-based control engine (TwinLight) configured within BIM to implement predefined lighting control policies for adaptive scenarios"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Runtime sensor deployed in physical building to detect occupancy patterns via infrared or PIR technology, providing real-time data streams to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring lighting levels (lux) at specific building locations, transmitting data via Eclipse Hono for adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart meter sensor tracking real-time energy consumption metrics (kWh) for building systems, feeding data into the Digital Twin for performance analytics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Thermal sensor monitoring indoor temperature (Celsius) to support HVAC optimization and occupant comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Air quality sensor measuring CO2 levels (ppm) to inform ventilation control systems and indoor environmental quality assessments"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model serving as the semantic backbone containing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components, enriched with runtime semantics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler, UnrealEngineEnabler
]

instance DeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured metadata model extracted from BIM containing tenant IDs, device IDs, and endpoint addresses used to configure runtime artifacts in Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoEnabler, CommissioningService
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime control logic model embedded in BIM representing sensor configurations, actuator mappings, and policy rules for adaptive building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinLightRuleEngine, BOREALISReinforcementLearner
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream processed from physical sensors, used for adaptive lighting and space utilization analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveLightingService
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental lighting data collected from sensors, serving as input for adaptive lighting control and energy optimization services"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveLightingService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous energy consumption metrics processed from smart meters, enabling real-time performance monitoring and predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Thermal data collected from building sensors, used for HVAC optimization and occupant comfort assessments"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACOptimizationService
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Air quality data from CO2 sensors enabling ventilation control and indoor environmental quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACOptimizationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware platform facilitating bidirectional data exchange between physical devices and the Digital Twin via MQTT/CoAP protocols"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AdaptiveLightingService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto device twin platform enabling real-time device registration, metadata management, and bidirectional synchronization between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization of the Digital Twin for real-time monitoring and interactive control interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, UserInterfaceService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating the generation of runtime artifacts from BIM models, including Ditto device twins and Unreal Engine assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, CommissioningService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of operational data (energy consumption, occupancy trends) through Unreal Engine 5 interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualizationInsight, EnergyConsumptionInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service dynamically adjusting lighting systems based on occupancy and environmental data using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) and rule-based policies (TwinLight)"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction, OccupancyBasedControlInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing energy consumption patterns to predict and optimize building energy performance through predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsInsight, ConsumptionForecastAction
]

instance HVACOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing HVAC operations based on temperature, occupancy, and CO2 data to improve energy efficiency and occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalComfortInsight, HVACAdjustmentAction
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling automated device registration, configuration, and validation using BIM metadata and Ditto platform"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceCommissioningAction, ConfigurationValidationInsight
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime artifacts (Ditto device twins, Unreal assets) from enriched BIM models using Model-Driven Engineering principles"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArtifactGenerationAction, DeploymentValidationInsight
]

instance CommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating device commissioning and validation processes using structured BIM metadata and Ditto platform"
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningValidationAction
]

instance UserInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 3D interfaces for facility managers to monitor and control building systems through Unreal Engine"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveControlAction, VisualizationInterfaceInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of real-time occupancy patterns within the building environment displayed through Unreal Engine interface"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics visualized in the Digital Twin interface for performance monitoring and optimization"
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy and environmental conditions using reinforcement learning algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OccupancyBasedControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of occupancy patterns to inform adaptive control policies for lighting and HVAC systems"
]

instance EnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of potential energy savings based on current consumption patterns and optimization scenarios"
]

instance ConsumptionForecastAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated forecasting of energy consumption trends to enable proactive optimization measures"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of thermal comfort conditions based on temperature, humidity, and occupancy data"
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC systems to maintain optimal thermal conditions based on real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceCommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated process of registering and configuring physical devices in the Digital Twin system using BIM metadata"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ConfigurationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results of device configurations against BIM specifications and operational requirements"
]

instance ArtifactGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime artifacts (device twins, visualization assets) from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of deployed runtime artifacts against design specifications to ensure proper functionality"
]

instance CommissioningValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated validation of commissioned devices against operational requirements and BIM specifications"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InteractiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Facility manager's ability to interactively control building systems through the 3D Digital Twin interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VisualizationInterfaceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization interface providing real-time monitoring and control capabilities for building systems"
]

// C18: Environment/Component
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical and virtual environment encompassing the building infrastructure Digital Twin system including all components and services"
    base:contains BIMModel, DeviceMetadataModel, ControlLogicModel,
        OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
        TemperatureSensor, CO2Sensor,
        LightingActuator, HVACController,
        EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler, UnrealEngineEnabler,
        ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance AdaptiveLightingSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building component representing the adaptive lighting infrastructure including sensors, actuators, and control logic for dynamic lighting management"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized building control infrastructure integrating HVAC, lighting, and other operational systems with the Digital Twin"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance DigitalTwinFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Core framework orchestrating interactions between physical and virtual components including data processing, visualization, and control services"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves **control signals and runtime adjustments** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the physical system via **Eclipse Ditto and middleware integration**. The framework supports **reinforcement learning-based control** (as in BOREALIS) and **adaptive policies** that dynamically adjust lighting and energy systems based on real-time feedback. While the text does not specify latency metrics, the system is designed for **low-latency bidirectional communication** to enable responsive control actions. The DT also incorporates **runtime configuration management**, allowing adjustments without full redeployment, ensuring seamless interaction with the physical infrastructure."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems, enabling **continuous data exchange** with minimal latency. While specific time granularities (e.g., milliseconds, seconds) are not explicitly stated, the framework is designed for **low-latency interactions** to support dynamic control and monitoring. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the DT’s responsiveness and alignment with the physical twin over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **Central DT Hub**: Manages high-level services (e.g., visualization, analytics) and coordinates interactions via Ditto’s device twin registry,
  - **Device Twins**: Lightweight microservices representing physical assets (e.g., sensors, actuators) with localized state management,
  - **Control Plugins**: Modular extensions (e.g., TwinLight’s lighting control, BOREALIS’s RL policies) integrated via standardized APIs,
  - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine renders **interactive 3D models** with real-time data overlays (e.g., sensor readings, control states),
  - **Data Pipeline**: Eclipse Hono ingests sensor data, Ditto manages device twins, and MDE tools generate runtime artifacts.
  The constellation supports **dynamic reconfiguration** (e.g., adding new sensors) and **cross-platform interoperability** (e.g., BIM ↔ IoT ↔ AI)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **three primary lifecycle stages** aligned with the building’s operational phases:
  1. **Design/Construction**: BIM models are enriched with **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor placements, control logic) for DT deployment preparation,
  2. **Operation**: The DT enables **real-time monitoring, control, and optimization** of the physical building (e.g., adaptive lighting, energy management),
  3. **Adaptation/Refurbishment**: The DT supports **post-occupancy analysis** (e.g., performance gaps, maintenance needs) and **retrofitting planning** via updated BIM models.
  The framework also distinguishes between **as-designed** (idealized BIM), **as-manufactured** (post-construction validation), and **as-operated** (runtime data-integrated) representations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the alignment between the virtual and physical systems. The framework does not explicitly detail **IFC schema validation**, **uncertainty handling**, or **user-defined test cases**, but the ODTE metric serves as the primary mechanism for assessing the DT’s accuracy and responsiveness. The **automated deployment pipeline** ensures consistency in model-to-model and model-to-text transformations, reducing semantic drift over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **real-time data exchange**, enabling bidirectional communication between physical devices and the virtual twin. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, CoAP) are not mentioned, the framework leverages **standardized middleware integration** to ensure interoperability. Security measures are implied but not detailed; the focus is on **low-latency synchronization** rather than explicit protocol specifications."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT hosting and deployment are facilitated by a **model-driven framework** designed for **scalable, automated deployment** across heterogeneous infrastructure systems. The framework does not specify **Kubernetes**, **AWS**, or **Raspberry Pi** environments, but emphasizes **modular, service-oriented architectures** for flexible deployment. The **Unreal Engine** component is likely hosted on standard computing infrastructure, while the **Hono/Ditto middleware** may require dedicated servers or cloud-based deployments for real-time processing."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
   - **BIM models** as the semantic backbone for device and control logic representation.
   - **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for real-time data exchange with physical systems.
   - **Reinforcement learning frameworks** (e.g., BOREALIS) for adaptive control policies.
   The framework does not mention **OPC UA**, **cloud services**, or **external DTs**, but emphasizes **interoperability** through standardized middleware and modular design."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which provides the semantic foundation for device modeling and control logic. The framework does not explicitly reference **IFC**, **OMA LWM2M**, or **MQTT v3.1.1**, but emphasizes **standardized integration frameworks** (e.g., Hono/Ditto) to ensure interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]
